# yAtIverse

> Start Up Right. Every tool a founder needs, in one place.

yAtIverse is an AI-native ecosystem for ambitious solo founders and builders.
It combines AI-connected wearables, intelligent agents, and a Founder OS into
one unified system — always working, never sleeping.

## Products

- Signal Ring: A smart wearable that tracks founder focus, biometrics, and work state
- Thread Pendant: A second wearable for passive context and presence signaling
- yAtI OS: A personal command center for goals, launches, workflows, and daily priorities
- AI Agents: Four specialized agents (Launch, Network, Focus, Brand) that run autonomously

## Key pages

- [Home](https://yativerse.ai/): Product overview and waitlist signup
- [AI Agents](https://yativerse.ai/agents): The invisible team — Launch, Network, Focus, Brand agents
- [yAtI OS](https://yativerse.ai/os): Founder OS command center details
- [Wearables](https://yativerse.ai/wearables): Signal Ring and Thread Pendant
- [Waitlist](https://yativerse.ai/waitlist): Early access signup — limited spots

## Audience

Built for first-time founders, solo operators, and vision-led creators who need
the infrastructure of a full team without hiring one.

## Status

Currently in early access. Waitlist open at https://yativerse.ai/waitlist
Signal Ring targeting Q4 2026 for early access members. All deposits refundable.
Pioneer tier starts at $49 deposit.

## Contact

Website: https://yativerse.ai
Twitter/X: https://x.com/yAtIverse
Instagram: https://instagram.com/yAtIverse
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/yAtIverse
YouTube: https://youtube.com/@yAtIverse

## No public API

No public API available yet. Integrations are managed through the yAtI OS dashboard.
